snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.independence: Independent read-only review audited the exact replacement Dataset query candidate, real privacy-drift repair, focused selectors, eight evidence projections, Owner wording, unchanged statuses and explicit residual boundaries; it reported CLEAR and made no edits.

dimensions.summary: Current capability, owner boundaries and open Dataset-query work remain directly locatable in existing topic documents without a new owner or navigation surface.
API, Context, Job, Database, Pi, Tech, UI and Playbook agree on one typed catalog/query, bounded worker, exact citations and privacy-drift audit.
Eight exact evidence claims project only to existing partial acceptance rows; PIGE-DATA-002, E6.11, every status and every phase state remain unchanged.
The contract distinguishes current implementation, data ownership, safety fences and the next query, browsing, composition and platform slices.
Localized current-state synchronization adds no Owner document, duplicates no large contract and remains within every documentation budget.

verification.evidence: The final exact Dataset query candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The PRD contract closes at 152/10/11 P0/P1/P2 items, 102 Requirements/capabilities, 144 Builds and 100 Exits; 87 Decisions and all four cross-document contract gates pass.

Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,145 claims; eight Dataset query evidence claims are bound only to existing partial rows, while Dataset Requirements, Exits and all ten phase states remain unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 55 Markdown files, 3,449 of 3,700 entry words, 4,618 trace lines, 234,014 trace bytes and 1,148,963 of 1,210,000 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Dataset typed local query and exact citations executable evidence
coordination.compatibility: This candidate adds one bounded Pi-selected local Dataset query and exact cited Home result over the existing managed-collection Bundle. It adds no public Dataset API, query builder, edit surface, dependency, phase renumbering or status promotion.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze replacement bytes after repairing the real privacy-drift audit boundary. Product Planning synchronized only affected Owners and existing partial acceptance rows; independent review cleared the exact replacement candidate.

nonBlockingRisks: The query engine is limited to the fixed Pige managed_collection SQLite payload; analytical snapshots, Parquet and DuckDB remain open.
Each Home turn permits one catalog followed by one query; joins, composition and multi-Dataset analysis remain open.
Independent Dataset browsing, paging, citation-open and result highlighting remain open.
Formula and warning detail, large-table UX, complete locale acceptance and signed platform evidence remain open.
Readable revision or privacy drift receives a replacement audit; corrupt or unsafe evidence fails closed earlier.
Conversation owns checksum-bound preview and citations while Job refs remain body-free; future wording and implementation must preserve that distinction.
